patch_items.operator_action: Copy the generated work-package templates to a real submission directory, replace all TODO/header-only content with field/operator/replay values, set R7_TO_R8P_WORK_PACKAGE_DIR to that directory, and rerun Agent61.
patch_items.acceptance_check: R7_TO_R8P_WORK_PACKAGE_DIR must point to an existing directory containing every expected work-package subdirectory before package-level preflight can evaluate evidence gaps.
patch_items.failure_boundary: No package can become field evidence until a real submission directory is supplied.

next_operator_action: Copy the generated work-package templates to a real submission directory, replace all TODO/header-only content with field/operator/replay values, set R7_TO_R8P_WORK_PACKAGE_DIR to that directory, and rerun Agent61.
patch_plan_boundary: This patch plan converts preflight blockers into operator-repair tasks only. It is not field evidence, does not replace R7 import, and cannot bypass R8p/R8v/holdout/release gates.
